name: Linux Capabilities Discovery
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Linux Capabilities Discovery
SIGMA Description: Detects attempts to discover the files with setuid/setgid capability on them. That would allow adversary to escalate their privileges.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%getcap%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-r%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%/%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Linux Capabilities Discovery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%getcap%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-r%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%/%' AQL filter query
